name: windows-install-prep
description: Licensed Windows 11 install/media plan (official download + optional DISM outline; no piracy)

steps.text: Official media: https://www.microsoft.com/software-download/windows11 — skill windows-install-prep. No fake Windows 12, no keys, no rebrand ISO compilers.

steps.prompt: Using skill windows-install-prep and knowledge/windows/ (official-media.md, dism-unattend-hygiene.md), produce: (1) verdict ready/needs-license-clarity/backup-first (2) official-media-plan for Windows 11 via microsoft.com/software-download/windows11 (3) if fleet/DISM mentioned: dism-service-plan high-level only (4) unattend-skeleton with ProductKey placeholder only (5) preflight-checklist (6) refuse any Windows 12 rebrand, cracks, or generic keys. Not legal advice. Microsoft terms apply.
